headline: Gringo’s Goblins: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Gringo’s Goblins is projected #12 of 16 with a 70.60 championship-lineup C-AVI average, led by Emeka Egbuka, Kyren Williams, and Davante Adams. The immediate priority is improving the FLEX slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Verified championship-lineup C-AVI average from all 16 AVI-Core knowledge team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 8, Gringo’s Goblins traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired Tre' Harris, Emeka Egbuka, Kyren Williams, 2027 Round 1 (original roster 9) while sending Omarion Hampton, Chris Godwin, A.J. Brown, 2027 Round 2 (original roster 15). Tre' Harris is now on the current roster at 40.9 C-AVI and 64.2 D-AVI; Emeka Egbuka is now the current WR starter at 85.5 C-AVI and 86.5 D-AVI; Kyren Williams is now the current RB starter at 83.3 C-AVI and 83.8 D-AVI; The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the FLEX slot above Jonathon Brooks's 52.6 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 79.1 C-AVI would directly attack the 3.31-point projected gap to DMV Fantasy.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On May 3, Phalhala or Bust traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Michael Wilson, 2026 Round 2 (original roster 3), 2026 Round 4 (original roster 7) while sending Romeo Doubs. Michael Wilson is now the current WR starter at 62.6 C-AVI and 74.8 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

rival_below.summary: On May 3, Phalhala or Bust traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Michael Wilson, 2026 Round 2 (original roster 3), 2026 Round 4 (original roster 7) while sending Romeo Doubs. Michael Wilson is now the current WR starter at 62.6 C-AVI and 74.8 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #12 of 16 at 70.60 lineup C-AVI. DMV Fantasy is immediately above at 73.91, a gap of 3.31. Phalhala or Bust is immediately behind at 69.36.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Emeka Egbuka (85.5), Kyren Williams (83.3), and Davante Adams (80.3).

Tre' Harris is now on the current roster at 40.9 C-AVI and 64.2 D-AVI; Emeka Egbuka is now the current WR starter at 85.5 C-AVI and 86.5 D-AVI; Kyren Williams is now the current RB starter at 83.3 C-AVI and 83.8 D-AVI; The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the FLEX slot above Jonathon Brooks's 52.6 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 79.1 C-AVI would directly attack the 3.31-point projected gap to DMV Fantasy. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
